top_signals.title: NZD: Hedge Funds Amass Biggest New Zealand Dollar Net Short Since 2006
top_signals.summary: Leveraged funds have taken their short positions on the New Zealand dollar to a record high, betting that a recent rebound in global oil prices may exacerbate domestic economic pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
